constants.name: AuditTrailRetentionInDays
constants.documentation:
Number of days after which audit trail records will be deleted for 'Completed' and 'Aborted' workflows. 

Default: 365 days.

constants.name: DueDateExpirationInDays
constants.documentation:
Remaining number of days until the 'Due Date' of a workflow or user task before a visual indicator appears. 

Default: 2 days.
